visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with styled brown hair sits centered in a studio environment, wearing large white over-ear headphones and a crisp white sweatshirt with a black and red striped collar. He speaks into a professional black microphone on a boom arm. In the background, a light grey shelf holds several anime figurines, primarily characters with yellow and blue hair. The lighting is bright and consistent across the frame. (2) A product shot replaces the man, showing a carton of Ruisui Coffee Milk (瑞穗咖啡牛奶). The packaging is light tan with images of coffee beans and a milk splash. Small text and a microwave-safe icon are visible at the top. The background is a soft, warm blur. (3) The man returns to the frame, gesturing with his right hand by pointing his finger toward the viewer while continuing to speak. His expression is focused and animated, emphasizing his points with subtle head movements. The anime figurines remain static in the background. (4) The scene cuts to a wider shot of two other people sitting at a desk with microphones. On the left is a person wearing a large, orange-faced traditional Japanese-style mask with a blue hairstyle and a red vest. To the right sits a woman with long black hair wearing a purple shirt. They are in the same studio with a light blue curtain behind them. (5) A close-up zoom of the Coffee Milk carton focuses on the Chinese characters for 'Coffee' (咖啡). The visual highlights how the 'mouth' radical is shared between the two characters in the logo design. (6) The man in the white shirt laughs heartily, leaning back slightly in his chair. His eyes are closed and his mouth is wide open in a jovial expression. (7) Product cartons for Mai Xiang (麥香) drinks are shown: first Black Tea (red), then Green Tea (green), and finally Milk Tea (brown). The masked person appears next to them, gesturing towards the cartons. (8) A close-up detail of the Mai Xiang Milk Tea packaging shows a small illustration of a black-and-white cow grazing in a field, which is a detail specific only to the milk tea variety. (9) The man in the white shirt speaks directly to the camera again, holding a smartphone in his hand. A small circular logo overlay of a man's face appears briefly. The scene ends with a call-to-action overlay text on a white background.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 你知道嗎. [Logo]: @yga0721. (2) [Subtitle]: 瑞穗咖啡牛奶. (3) [Subtitle]: 喝過啦齁. (4) [Slogan]: 統一的瑞穗咖啡牛奶. (5) [Subtitle]: 上面包裝盒那個. (6) [Subtitle]: 咖啡兩個字. (7) [Subtitle]: 咖跟啡都有個口嘛. (8) [Subtitle]: 然後咖. (9) [Subtitle]: 是口跟一個加. (10) [Subtitle]: 口加口. (11) [Subtitle]: 咖啡. (12) [Subtitle]: 然後他那中間那個口. (13) [Subtitle]: 是共用同一個. (14) [Variety]: 嗚哦哦哦!!. (15) [Subtitle]: 好無聊. (16) [Subtitle]: 麥香不是有. (17) [Subtitle]: 紅茶綠茶奶茶. (18) [Subtitle]: 對. (19) [Subtitle]: 只有奶茶. (20) [Subtitle]: 的包裝上面有牛. (21) [Subtitle]: 蛤. (22) [Subtitle]: 哪裡有牛啊. (23) [Subtitle]: 有有一隻牛哎. (24) [Subtitle]: 小小的. (25) [Subtitle]: 紅茶綠茶沒有. (26) [Subtitle]: 因為奶茶才有用到牛奶. (27) [Subtitle]: 所以它多了一隻乳牛哎. (28) [Variety]: 喔喔喔!!. (29) [Subtitle]: 好無聊哦. (30) [Subtitle]: 好細緻哦. (31) [Subtitle]: 是不是很. (32) [Subtitle]: 紅茶綠茶沒有用到牛奶. (33) [Subtitle]: 所以它沒有. (34) [Subtitle]: 放一隻乳牛上去.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator in white, 1 masked male guest, 1 female guest
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Male with brown hair, wearing a white sweatshirt with black and red collar stripes and white over-ear headphones.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A podcast studio setting featuring grey shelving units filled with anime figurines (Dragon Ball Z characters), a light blue curtain, and a wooden table with microphones.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice speaks with an upbeat and conversational tone, articulating clearly with a natural speech rate. The audio is extremely clean with a high signal-to-noise ratio, typical of a professional studio recording. There is no background music or environmental noise present. (2) The same male voice continues to explain a observation, his pitch rising and falling naturally to convey curiosity. A brief burst of laughter from multiple people occurs as a reaction to his comment, indicating a group setting with high vocal arousal. (3) A female voice enters the mix, maintaining the same casual and energetic tone. She speaks at a moderate pace, her voice sounding crisp and well-defined. She is followed by brief affirmative responses from another male voice. (4) The group engages in a dynamic vocal exchange with overlapping voices and collective 'Ohh!' exclamations. The vocal intensity peaks during moments of shared surprise. The audio finishes with a few final words from the main male speaker in a slightly more relaxed tone.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Fact 1 (Coffee Milk Design) -> Reaction -> Fact 2 (Milk Tea Packaging) -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To entertain the audience by sharing trivial but interesting design 'easter eggs' found on common beverage packaging in Taiwan, leveraging a podcast-style group reaction format to increase engagement.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed focus on specific product packaging and brand features of Uni-President products.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A fast-paced social media edit focused on local Taiwanese food trivia, using a podcast setting for social proof and humor.
